# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

apiVersion: azurerm.microsoft.com/2017-06-01
type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments  # role assignments are a type in ARM resources (required by Azure) that assigns permissions to the user or group on an entity within Azure Resource Manager. In this case, it is used for permissioning pipeline deployable resource types at subscription level i.e., can be any kind of managed service instance and not just VM's
properties:  # properties are a set of variable bindings that provide values to the ARM template when being deployed on Azure (required by Azure). In this case, it is used for assigning name etc.. in subscription level scope.
- id: "/subscriptions/0123456789"  # Subscription ID where role assignment should be created or already exists and updated within the context of current deployment if resourceIDs have not been specified here, can also provide existing Managed Service Id etc to add this permission.
- principalType: "ServicePrincipal"  
  principalId: "/subscriptions/0123456789/tenants/{Tenant_GUID}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/policyDefinitions{PolicyDefinitionID}" # This should be your service Principle ID and Tenant GUID from Azure Active Directory
  roleDefinitionId: "b2cAdmin"    # the Role definition id which has Contributor access at subscription level for our CI CD pipeline. can also provide other ARM roles such as 'Reader' or others etc.. based on your requirement (required by Azure)
